case_title: CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. VS. KEY LIME WEST, INC. et al

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KEY LIME WEST, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEY LIME WEST, INC. $5,713.88 PRINCIPAL, $414.96 INTEREST, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,408.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
